Double-crosses, disguises, and comic chaos pile up as each man tries to outwit the others, with greed proving to be the wildest outlaw of all. A playful twist on the Spaghetti Western, this action-packed romp mixes gunfights with sharp humor and larger-than-life characters.

programme.title: Son of the Renegade 1953

As the son of a notorious outlaw, he fights to escape the shadow of his father’s crimes and prove himself a man of honor. With outlaws closing in and the law on his trail, he takes a stand to defend the innocent and clear his name. Packed with gun-slinging action, high-stakes drama, and frontier grit, this Western asks—can the son of a renegade carve out a destiny of his own?

Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.desc: Scarlet Fry takes you on the thrill of your life with: Blood Thirsty Cannibals, Satanic Zombies, Demented Nurses, Junkie Serial Killers, Freaky Perverts and More! This Blood Drenched Deluxe Horrorfest isn’t for the weak at heart. A drug dealer has made his last deal after he decides to hand a junkie serial killer (Calico Cooper) some bad junk. This junk is, in fact, a video tape entitled “Junkfood Horrorfest.” This horror anthology, hosted by Scarlet Fry, features six twisted tales that kick off when the junkie and her new found friend decide to watch the tape. Little does her friend know how much trouble he’s in for. Get ready for a blood drenched, deluxe horrorfest that isn’t for the weak at heart. Twisted tales that will turn your stomach and send you crying for Mommy! This special edition is value packed with two bonus programs, “Scarlet Fry's Horrorama,” Scarlet Fry's presentation of the cult classic “Carnival of Souls,” and more!

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep103: Mysterious Tentacles

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep101
programme.desc: Liquid Edge kayaks the insane whitewaters of Canada’s Stikine Canyon, flies above a boat with the water powered Jet Lev system, goes behind the scenes of Oakley’s Wave of the Winter featuring World Champion surfer Kelly Slater, and delves deep into a surf barrel via GoPro’s Ride of The Winter.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep108: Manatees and Dugongs In Danger
programme.desc: Each year, hundreds of critically endangered manatees are killed in U.S. waters by boats, disease and cold weather. 2006 was the worst year on record for manatee deaths – 416 animals perished. With only a few thousand remaining in the wild, mostly in heavily developed Florida wetlands, the clock is ticking in efforts to save this amazing mammal from extinction.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep305: US Virgin Islands by Paddleboard
programme.desc: With sheltered turquoise waters, the U.S. Virgin Islands is an ideal location to explore by stand-up paddleboard. In this Facing Waves episode, we compete in USVI's Paddle-The-Park SUP race, we snorkel fish-filled waters, and find out why SUP yoga has become so popular.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Season 3 of Surviving Mann starts with no time wasted... straight to PT. The contestants are thrown straight into physical training, to determine where everyone lies and how to properly group them into the iconic Black and Blue Surviving Mann teams. From Olympic athletes to cast favorites, these eight competitors are ready to prove what they’ve got.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: A group of 5 All Star contestants were chosen to embark on an adventure overseas, but what they didn’t know is that it would become a maritime mission. Radio Host Kerri Kasem and rockstar Ashba join Don as he breaks the news to the contestants that there’s more to this yacht than a pleasure cruise. If they thought that this trip was going to be smooth sailing, they soon realized how mistaken they were when Don hit them with the hardest physical evolution in Surviving Mann’s history.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The Glove Returns with a vengeance! This crop of contestants is the best of the best.. but how do they stack up against The Glove? Where about to find out. After The Glove waves goodbye, it’s hot-headed friend makes a debut courtesy of Exothermic Technologies. The contestants have a hard time keeping a smile off their faces as they shoot at targets and then blow them up.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: CQB training is imperative for mission success, and since Don doesn’t do anything half-heartedly, it was time for a road trip. Equipped with Titanium Foam suppressors (yeah, you read that right), the team is ready to test their skills in an elite training facility. Afterwards, we check in with Dr. Jen for a sneak peak at the new Surviving Mann: All Stars filming location.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Competitors Stephen and Danny sit down to recap the best and worst moments so far in the season. Also, Chris and Cindy sit down with Compliant Technologies’ founder to get the backstory on how the innovative product that is sweeping the nation (and terrorizing the contestants) came to be. Then Dr. West drops some truth bombs on the state of the average human body’s blood.

programme.title: Around the ACL
programme.desc: ATA 211: Open #6 Preview, Doubles Storylines to Watch, and Too High or Too Low Rankings Open #6 is here, and Around the ACL is getting you ready for everything to watch. Meesh, Jake, and Anthony break down the Singles field—who’s trending, who’s dangerous, and where the biggest runs could come from. Then it’s all about Doubles, as we look at key teams, potential breakout pairs, and which duos could make serious noise this weekend. To close it out, we bring back a fan-favorite debate segment: Too High or Too Low. Are some of the current rankings where they should be—or way off? We take a closer look at names like Matt Guy, the duo of Koby Costanza / Tommy Sliker, and Sarah Cassidy / Matt Wilson—and give our honest takes. Predictions, pressure points, and plenty of debate—this one sets the stage for Open #6.

programme.title: Wolves' Weddings | Brilliant Corners: Algeria, Episode 2
programme.desc: Sam, Lucy, and Erwan head to the naturally beautiful Kabyle region along with locals Dihya Nasri and Walid Assef. Once there, they surf some clean, cold, and completely uncrowded peelers and get some famous ice cream in Béjaïa, a market city known for its rich music scene, vibrant clothing, and incredible views of the Sapphire Coast. They then explore the stunning Cap Carbon headlands and learn about the native Berber culture and ancient Kabyle language.

programme.desc: The CBS 4 Nightly News Team presents a report on the major news events of the day and the details of late breaking news stories along with the latest sports updates, Palm Springs area weather conditions and the weather forecast for tomorrow.

programme.title: News Channel 3 News at 11
programme.desc: The NewsChannel 3 Team presents an in-depth report on the major news events of the day and the details of late-breaking news stories, along with the latest sports updates, Norfolk area weather conditions and the weather forecast for tomorrow.

programme.title: Newschannel 3 in the Morning
programme.desc: The NewsChannel 3 Team provides a first in-depth look at overnight local, regional, statewide and national news events as well as up-to-the-minute business news, sports reports and the latest information on local weather and traffic issues.
